lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Hello. Welcome to the Gielinor Housing Agency! What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you move my house please?

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Where would you like it moved to?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: To Rimmington please!

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house is already there!

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Hmph. Come back when you have 5,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house has been moved to Rimmington.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: To Taverley please!

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: I'm afraid you don't have a high enough Construction level to move there. You need to have level 10.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house is already there!

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Hmph. Come back when you have 5,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house has been moved to Taverley.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: To Pollnivneach please!

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: I'm afraid you don't have a high enough Construction level to move there. You need to have level 20.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house is already there!

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Hmph. Come back when you have 7,500 coins.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house has been moved to Pollnivneach.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: To Hosidius please!

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: I'm afraid you don't have a high enough Construction level to move there. You need to have level 25.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house is already there!

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Hmph. Come back when you have 8,750 coins.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Absolutely. Hand me your blueprints and I'll make it happen! I'll keep the blueprints, so you'll always be able to switch back to this style in future, for a small fee.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house has been moved to Hosidius.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: To Rellekka please!

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: I'm afraid you don't have a high enough Construction level to move there. You need to have level 30.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house is already there!

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Hmph. Come back when you have 10,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house has been moved to Rellekka.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: To Brimhaven please!

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: I'm afraid you don't have a high enough Construction level to move there. You need to have level 40.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house is already there!

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Hmph. Come back when you have 15,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house has been moved to Brimhaven.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: To Yanille please!

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: I'm afraid you don't have a high enough Construction level to move there. You need to have level 50.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house is already there!

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Hmph. Come back when you have 25,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house has been moved to Yanille.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: To Prifddinas please!

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Where? Never heard of it.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: I'm afraid you don't have a high enough Construction level to move there. You need to have level 70.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house is already there!

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Hmph. Come back when you have 50,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house has been moved to Prifddinas.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you redecorate my house please?

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Certainly. My magic can rebuild the house in a completely new style! What style would you like?

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house is already in that style!

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Hmph. Come back when you have 5,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house has been redecorated.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house is already in that style!

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Hmph. Come back when you have 5,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house has been redecorated.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house is already in that style!

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Hmph. Come back when you have 7,500 coins.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house has been redecorated.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house is already in that style!

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Hmph. Come back when you have 10,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house has been redecorated.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house is already in that style!

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Hmph. Come back when you have 15,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house has been redecorated.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house is already in that style!

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Hmph. Come back when you have 25,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house has been redecorated.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: I'm afraid you haven't unlocked that style.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house is already in that style!

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Hmph. Come back when you have 35,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house has been redecorated.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: I'm afraid I'd need some blueprints for that.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house is already in that style!

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house has been redecorated.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: I'm afraid I'd need some blueprints for that. Maybe you can buy some by working for the contractors.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house is already in that style!

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Hmph. Come back when you have 5,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house has been redecorated.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: I'm afraid you haven't unlocked that style.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house is already in that style!

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Hmph. Come back when you have 35,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Your house has been redecorated.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I have a Construction guide book?

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: You've already got one!

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Not until you free up some inventory space.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Certainly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about houses!

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: It all came out of the wizards' experiments. They found a way to fold space, so that they could pack many acres of land into an area only a foot across.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: They created several folded-space regions across Gielinor. Each one contains hundreds of small plots where people can build houses.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, so that's how everyone can have a house without them cluttering up the world!

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Quite. The wizards didn't want to get bogged down in the business side of things so they hired me to sell the houses.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: There are various other people across Gielinor who can help you furnish your house.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: You should start by buying planks from a sawmill operator. Sawmills are located in north-east Varrock, the Woodcutting Guild located in south-west Hosidius and north-east Prifddinas.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about that skillcape you're wearing.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: As you may know, skillcapes are only available to masters in a skill. I have spent my entire life building houses and now I spend my time selling them! As a sign of my abilities I wear this Skillcape of Construction.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: If you ever have enough skill to build a demonic throne, come and talk to me and I'll sell you a skillcape like mine.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: The Cape of Construction also provides you with as many teleports as you like to any of the house portals or even directly inside!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you sell me a Skillcape of Construction?

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Alright, that'll be 99000 coins, please. A small price to pay for such an illustrious cape that can teleport you to any of the house portals or even directly inside your house!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not paying that!

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Suit yourself. There are many other heroes who would love the opportunity to purchase one. You can find me here if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Certainly, that sounds fair.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But, unfortunately, I don't have enough money with me.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Well, come back and see me when you do.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Unfortunately all Skillcapes are only available with a free hood, it's part of a skill promotion deal; buy one get one free, you know. So you'll need to free up some inventory space before I can sell you one.

lines.speaker: Alwyn
lines.text: Excellent! Wear that cape with pride my friend.
